_note: Fill in bambu_password, then run encrypt_password.bat once: it replaces the plaintext with an encrypted 'bambu_password_enc' (Windows DPAPI) and removes 'bambu_password'. Recommended because this file may sync to the cloud (e.g. Google Drive). Alternatively leave the password empty and put a token in custom_token.
device_pass: the tablet's web password - see Settings > Web password on the tablet
